title: Prism Blast Summary v1
description: Derived summary metrics for the blast neighborhood of a single prism monument under a specific blast-radius policy.

prismId.description: Identifier of the prism monument contract this summary refers to.

policyId.description: ID of the blast-radius-policy-v1 used when computing this summary.

originNodeId.description: Origin node ID (e.g., dungeonNodeContract nodeId) for the blast neighborhood.

originRepoSlug.description: Repository slug for the origin node.

blastSize.description: Number of nodes in the blast neighborhood |B_p|.

riskExtremes.description: Extreme values of risk metrics over the blast neighborhood.

maxRiskScore.description: Maximum combined risk score (e.g., CIC/AOS/DET-weighted) across nodes in the neighborhood.

maxDetDelta.description: Maximum cumulative DET delta observed along any path to nodes in the neighborhood.

engagementAverages.description: Average engagement metrics over the blast neighborhood.

avgUEC.description: Average User Engagement Coefficient across nodes in the neighborhood.

avgARR.description: Average Ambiguous Resolution Ratio across nodes in the neighborhood.

avgCDL.description: Average Cognitive Dissonance Load across nodes in the neighborhood.

repoExposure.description: Per-repository exposure fractions for this prism's blast neighborhood.

fraction.description: Fraction of nodes in the neighborhood belonging to this repo.

computedAt.description: Timestamp when this summary was computed.

summaryMeta.description: Optional metadata for analysis and tooling.
